description.name: JBL PartyBox Encore 2 Wireless Party Speaker
description.description: DescriptionPRODUCT TOURPortable party speaker with 100W powerful sound, built-in dynamic light show, included digital wireless mic, and splash proof design.Be the Star of Your Next PartyThe portable JBL PartyBox Encore speaker gives you 10 hours of non-stop fun. With the easy grab-and-go handle and splash proof design, you can always take the party with you. Get the beat pumping with amazing JBL Original Pro Sound and deep bass. Sync the light show's rockin' strobes, ring and club lights for an awesomely immersive experience or sing along with the JBL premium digital wireless mic, optimized for karaoke with adjustable echo, bass, and treble. True Wireless Stereo means you can even pair speakers for truly massive sound. And with the PartyBox app, you can always control your music and your light show colors for the perfect vibe.Amazing JBL Original Pro SoundNothing beats amazing JBL Original Pro Sound with deep bass.A Light Show that Syncs to the BeatJBL's PartyBox light show makes your party shine with ring and club lights and rockin' strobe effects that sync to the beat of your music for an awesomely immersive audiovisual experience.10 Hours of Play TimePower the party all day or all night. With 10 hours of play time and a built-in rechargeable battery, the beat will go on (and on)!IPX4 Splash ProofFrom dancing on the beach to karaoke by the pool, the JBL PartyBox Encore is IPX4 splash proof, so you never have to worry about the party getting too wet or wild.Digital Wireless MicStep into the spotlight. The JBL PartyBox Encore includes one premium, die-cast zinc digital wireless microphone perfectly optimized for karaoke. It features low latency channel design along with adjustable bass, echo, and treble controls to enrich the vocal performances of anyone who wants to sing along. The digital wireless mic even comes with replaceable AA batteries, so you can party all day and rock all night.Pair Your Speakers for Even Bigger SoundOne JBL PartyBox not enough? Pair two speakers wirelessly with True Wireless Stereo (TWS) technology for an even bigger, bolder sound.PartyBox AppThe JBL PartyBox app makes it easier than ever to control your music, update settings, and customize the colors of your light show for the perfect party vibe.Multisource PlaybackStream your tunes wirelessly via Bluetooth, connect a USB stick, or plug in with an aux cable. The JBL PartyBox Encore offers ultimate adaptability for your music.Technical Specifications:Transducers: 1 x 5.25 inch woofer, 2 x 1.75 inch tweeterOutput power: 100 W RMSPower input: 100-240 V ~ / 50-60 HzFrequency response: 50 Hz - 20k Hz @-6dBSignal-to-noise ratio: Greater than 80 dBBattery type: Li-ion polymer 27Wh (equivalent to 3.6V 7500mAh)Battery charge time: 3.5 hoursMusic play time: up to 10 hours (dependent on volume level and audio content)USB SpecificationUSB format: FAT16, FAT32USB file format: .mp3, .wma, .wavUSB charge out: 5 V / 0.5 A (maximum)Cable type: AC power cableCable length: 2000 mm/78.7"Wireless SpecificationBluetooth version: 5.1Bluetooth's profile: A2DP 1.3, AVRCP 1.6Bluetooth transmitter frequency range: 2.4 GHz - 2.4835 GHzBluetooth transmitter power: Less than 9 dBm (EIRP)Bluetooth transmitter modulation: GFSK, p/4 DQPSK, 8DQPSKWireless Microphone SpecificationFrequency response: 60 Hz - 15.8 kHzSignal-to-noise ratio: Greater than 65 dBTransmitter transmitting power: Less than 10 mWDistance between transmitter and receiver: Less than or equal to 20 mIncludes:1 x AC power cord (AC plug and quantity varies by region)1 x JBL wireless microphoneProduct Features:Amazing JBL original pro soundA light show that syncs to the beatIPX4 splash proofDigital wireless micPair your speakers for even bigger soundPartyBox appMultisource playback

description.name: GS5 Pro 4K Ultra HD Open Source 30000+ Classic Game Station
description.description: GS5 Pro TV Game Box / Gaming Console with 2 Controllers - 30000+ Retro Games, 4K HD Output, Multi-Platform Support, 64GB TF CardThe GS5 Pro Game Box brings your favourite retro gaming consoles back to life, with access to over 30,000 games from 53 emulators, including PSP, PS1, DreamCast, N64, and more. With 4K output and smooth performance, it’s your all-in-one gaming hub for an immersive TV experience.Key Features & Benefits- Powerful Gaming Performance - Equipped with a quad-core N8 64-bit processor and 2 GB DDR4 RAM, the GS5 Pro ensures smooth gameplay across various classic emulators, handling both casual and intense games with ease.- Vast Game Library - Access over 30,000 games across 53 different emulators, from retro consoles like the PS1, N64, and DreamCast, to arcade favourites like MAME and Naomi.- High-Quality Video Output - Supports HD output with 4K and 1080P resolution for crisp, clear gaming visuals on your TV, enhancing the retro experience with modern clarity.- Expandable Storage - Comes with a 64GB TF card, expandable up to 256 GB, allowing you to store an enormous collection of ROMs and game data for easy access at all times.- Customizable Gaming Experience - Built-in features like game preview, game search, favourites, save/load progress, and custom button mapping allow for a tailored and seamless gaming session.- Versatile Controller Support - Compatible with wired controllers, 2.4G wireless controllers, and 2.4G joystick consoles for flexible gaming options depending on your preference.Specifications- CPU: Quad-core N8 64-bit high-performance chip- GPU: DDR4 2GB- Video Output: 4K, 1080P HD- Memory Expansion: Up to 256 GB- Storage: 64GB TF card (includes 30,000+ games)- Supported Game Formats: PSP, PS1, DreamCast, N64, NDS, NES, MAME, Naomi, SATURN, CPS, FC, GB, MD, Genesis, NEOGEO, SFC, Arcade, and more- Power Supply: 5V 1A (requires 1A or above)- Controller Support: Wired, 2.4G wireless, and 2.4G joystick console- Additional Features: Game preview, search, save/load progress, button customizationIdeal Examples of Use- Retro Gaming - Relive your childhood favourites from a wide range of consoles, all on one device, through high-quality 4K video output.- Family Fun - Perfect for family game nights; play multiplayer games with wireless controllers for a more interactive experience.- Gaming Enthusiasts - Create a home gaming centre with the GS5 Pro, featuring endless hours of entertainment through multiple emulators and games.- Gift Idea - A perfect gift for retro gaming lovers or anyone wanting to experience classic gaming on modern devices.Why the GS5 Pro is the Ultimate Gaming BoxWith its large game library, high-quality video output, and flexible storage options, the GS5 Pro offers unmatched versatility for retro gaming enthusiasts. It’s easy to use, portable, and compatible with a range of controllers, making it the ideal choice for anyone seeking a compact, all-in-one solution for their gaming needs.Interesting Facts About Retro Gaming Consoles- Emulators allow classic games to be played on modern hardware, bypassing the need for old consoles that might be prone to malfunction or hard to find.- Quad-core processing helps run older games smoothly while providing a seamless experience without lag or crashes.- Game preservation: Many older games are no longer commercially available, but with emulators, you can continue to play your favourites and preserve the history of gaming.Experience the ultimate retro gaming adventure with the GS5 Pro TV Game Box, bringing classic games into your home with modern-day ease.Package included:- 1 x Game Box- 1 x 64GB TF Card- 2 x Gamepad / Controller- 1 x Gamepad Receiver- 1 x HD Cable- 1 x Charging Cable- 1 x English User Manual

description.description: Replacement rubber tyre suitable for front or rear wheel of the Xiaomi M365. Xiaomi scooter tyres, like other vehicles, can experience wear and/or punctures and may need replacing.A rubber tyre can be used to avoid any risk of punctures in the future. One thing to be aware of is that rubber tyres cause a harder ride and are hard to fit to your scooter.This rubber tyres has been selected by the Pure Electric team as it offers the most flex and comfort from its honeycomb design. This helps reduce, but does not solve, the challenges associated with solid rubber tyres.Product SpecificationWhat's in the box: 1 x tyreSize: 8.5inch rubber tyreSuitability: Front or rear wheelCompatible: XiaomiFitting: Tyre levers (or equivalent) and grease will be needed to fit

description.name: Original 7 Multi  Coloured Himalayan Salt Lamp Natural
description.description: LED Color Changing SALT LAMP | HIMALAYAN GLOWCreated using salt crystals from the Himalayan Mountains in Pakistan, this salt lamp truly impresses. It’s designed to emit a soft glow, which works well to set the mood for a romantic dinner for two. You need 3x AA Batteries ( Included in the Box) to turn on the lamp. So, there is not any trouble displaying this lamp on a table, desk or nightstand. Natural Himalayan salt lamps aren’t actually orange. They’re made by placing a light bulb inside chunks of pink Himalayan salt, which gets its shade from minerals present in the salt. The light from the LED bulb inside gives the pink salt chunks a soothing orange hue that lightens the mood in any room.HighlightsThis Product makes for a unique and beautiful gift.Due to the nature of natural salt, each crystal varies in terms of weight, shape and color. Variation: 10%.Premium quality- there is no salt in the world that compares to Himalayan salt in purity and beauty.Hand carved to retain the unique, natural look of the salt crystals.Multicolor functionality, light automatically rotates between orange, blue, red, purple, green and pinkNatural Himalayan Salt Lamps - Authentic Pakistan Crystal Rock Salt Lamp with Plastic BaseWBM salt lamps are made from beautiful Himalayan crystal salt. Himalayan salt lamps have a distinctive natural look, since they are hand harvested from the mineral-rich Khewra mine in Pakistan, where the distinctive pink colored salt is found. This is the best salt lamp, with options to fit any kind of décor and room, whether you are looking for a bold statement or an accent side lamp. The natural color of a salt lamp adds beauty to any décor.WBM Salt Lamps for Home Décor Holiday Gifts, LED Bulb + Solid Plastic BaseNatural Multi Color Changing Salt Lamp is a calming, soothing and cozy table lamp to light up the whole room. WBM Himalayan Salt lamp is a best selection to your families, children, friends. It has wide and idea applications such as office room, bedroom, living room, yoga room, meditation room, SPA, restaurants, hotel rooms and lobby, or anywhere you think light source is important.Bulb Base Size: Non-Removable Integrated BulbCord Covering: PlasticMaximum Light Bulb Wattage: 25 WattsPower Source: BatteryBattery: 3x AA Alkaline, Required.Natural Himalayan Night Light Salt Lamp, Heart Design Metal BasketIdeal Gift ChoiceThe best gift on birthdays, Anniversaries, Weddings, Valentine’s Day, Father & Mother’s Day, Christmas, Graduation, Thanks Giving and special occasions.A Light for Every RoomEach lamp is hand made and each is unique in shape, color and looking. It adds special touch in your interior decoration. This salt lamp works in harmony with any home decoration. It will not let you down when you have such a relaxing, joyful and harmonious light.Natural Salt LampIt is a glow that speaks from millions of years ago yet familiar to us. The light is in rotating rainbow colors to give a soft hue in life.

description.name: VARTA V377/SR66 Silver Battery 1,5V 1 pcs
description.description: High quality Varta silver battery. Much more durable than an alkaline battery and therefore more willingly used by professionals in small electronic devices.Silver batteries differ from alkaline ones in a higher voltage level (1.55V compared to 1.5V in alkaline batteries) and the construction of the battery itself: in silver batteries the cathode is silver oxide and the anode is zinc. In alkaline batteries, the cathode is made of manganese dioxide and the anode is made of zinc oxide. For both types of batteries, the electrolyte is potassium hydroxide.Silver batteries last longer than alkaline batteries, therefore they are often used in devices such as watches, calculators, counters and other electronic devices. description.name: PHILIPS TAR5505/10 Audio Wooden Housing DAB+/FM/ Clock Bluetooth Radio
description.description: Thanks to its DAB+ tuner, this digital radio provides crystal clear reception. Save up to 20 of your favourite stations to avoid long searching. Stream your playlist via BluetoothNot only does this Bluetooth radio play music, but it also serves you in the kitchen. Simply set a timer for your cake and read the remaining time on the digital LCD displayThis portable radio is very compact and can run on mains power (AC) or batteries. Listen to music, even if there isn’t anywhere to plug it inThis DAB+/FM radio is impressive due to its excellent sound as well as with its lightweight wooden housing. Use the built-in buttons to select your stations and adjust the volumeIncluded in delivery: Philips radio R5505/10 with Bluetooth, DAB+, wooden housing, 3-inch broadband speaker driver, kitchen timer, AC/DC adapter, quick start guidePhilips R5505/10 - The kitchen radioBeautiful design that fits inA light wood cabinet surrounds the black gloss display panel and the speaker, which is covered in grey speaker fabric. There are buttons on the front of the radio for tuning, source selection and more. Volume up/down is controlled via the sleek rotary dial.Compact and convenientUsing the plug socket for your food mixer? Keep the music going with batteries instead. When you're done whisking, plug the portable radio into a mains supply using the AC cable.Special featuresWooden cabinet with fabric speaker coverDAB+/FM radioDigital tuningBluetooth3" full-range speaker driverClear displayButtons on the frontKitchen timerRadio and more. Sounds to cook toWhip up an omelette to your morning playlist. Make dinner while you stream a podcast. With DAB+, FM and Bluetooth, this portable radio brings your kitchen to life.Clear display. Kitchen timerSee how long your dish has left to cook, at a glance. This portable radio boasts a kitchen timer, which is simple to set via the radio menu. The digital display shows a countdown timer in hours, minutes and seconds.Great in the kitchenFrom non-stop music to the latest news, this digital radio is your ticket to better listening while you cook! The DAB+ tuner delivers crystal-clear reception and you can set up to 20 presets for your favourite stations.

description.name: Philips TAK4206BL  Type-C Wired & BT Wireless Headset Blue
description.description: SAFE AND KID FRIENDLY: Limited to 83dB, these children friendly headphones have been carefully designed to provide your kids with a clear sound experience while keeping the volume under control. With integrated buttons make it easy for kids to control volumeSEAMLESS BLUETOOTH CONNECTION: Our wireless headphones are compatible with most Bluetooth devices and ensure the best possible sound when connected to your phone, iPad, iPod and other devices up to 10-meter distance - ideal for school and travellingPERFECTLY DESIGNED FOR KIDS: With soft ear-cup cushions and a soft headband these headphones are carefully designed to keep kids comfortable - whether they're listening to music or watching their favourite YouTubers. With 4 different colours of lightPHILIPS HEADPHONES APP: Did you know? The 'Philips Headphones App' lets you adjust the sound volume and limit play time. A voice prompt alerts your child if their time limit has been reached and the app can automatically lower volume if it goes too high?DELIVERY: These foldable over-ear wireless headphones come with a case for easy storage. This product includes an USB-C cable and a quick start guide

description.name: Philips 6000 Series (TAH6509BK/00) Light Weight 70H Dynamic Bass ANC BT Headphones Black
description.description: Description of the Philips TAH6509BK/00 ANC BlackThe Philips TAH6509BK/00 ANC Black lets you listen to your favourite music undisturbed. Active Noise Cancelling (ANC) filters out distracting ambient noise, so you can fully immerse yourself in the sound. The headphones offer up to 70 hours of battery life without ANC and up to 45 hours with ANC, so you can listen for days without recharging. The lightweight and foldable design makes it ideal for travelling.Noise cancelling for an undisturbed listening experienceThe Philips TAH6509BK/00 features Active Noise Cancelling, which minimises outside noise. This is perfect if you want to concentrate on music or podcasts without distractions. Still want to take in some of your surroundings? Then simply enable Quick Awareness, so you can continue to hear traffic or conversations, for example.Long battery life and quick charge functionWith a battery life of up to 70 hours, you don't have to worry about charging. Still run out of battery? Thanks to fast charging, you get 3 hours of playback time after just 5 minutes of charging. Full charging via USB-C takes only 2 hours, so you can quickly enjoy your music again.Comfortable and lightweight designThese Philips headphones are designed for long-wearing comfort. The soft over-ear ear pads and adjustable headband ensure a snug fit. The lightweight design prevents pressure on your head, allowing you to wear them effortlessly for longer periods of time. Moreover, it is foldable, making it easy to carry in your bag.Clear phone callsThe built-in microphone lets you make crystal-clear phone calls. Noise reduction filters out background noise, so you can always be heard clearly. Ideal for business calls or quick calls on the go.Easy operation and connectivityControl your music and calls easily via the ear-cup buttons. Thanks to Bluetooth 5.3, you have a stable wireless connection with your smartphone, tablet or laptop. The headphones also come with a 3.5 mm audio cable, so you can use them wired even when the battery runs out. The Philips TAH6509BK/00 ANC Black lets you enjoy good sound, effective noise cancelling and comfortable wear. A great choice for home, work or on the go!

description.name: Philips (TAQ2000BK/00) Ear Clip BT Headphones Black
description.description: Open wireless headphones in the form of grips are designed for all-day use with maximum comfort, stable connection and full awareness of the surroundings. It easily hangs on the outer part of the earbud without closing the ear canal, enabling simultaneous enjoyment of music and monitoring of the surroundings.Main features :• Open design with precision air drivers for listening without complete isolation• Adjustable grip mechanism and lightweight construction for a secure and comfortable fit all day• Up to 28 hours of playback with charging case (7 hours + additional 21 hours), quick charge for 1 hour of use in just 15 minutes• Bluetooth multipoint connection allows simultaneous connection with two devices• IPX4 splash and sweat resistance, ideal for everyday and active use• Microphone with noise reduction algorithm ensures clear voice transmission during calls• Practical controls on the headphones with the possibility of customization via the Philips Headphones app• The app offers Dynamic Bass amplification, soundscapes for relaxation and firmware updatesAdditional information:Thanks to the open construction, these headphones provide a balanced relationship between a private audio experience and awareness of the surroundings - ideal for walks, office environment or everyday duties. The buttons on the headphones can be configured according to the user's habits, and the support for Dynamic Bass allows additional sound adjustment according to personal preferences.

description.name: Philips TAV2000FB/00 Century Portable BT Radio
description.description: Classic design, modern soundFM digital tuningBluetooth 5.4User-replaceable batteryLooks from back then, sound from nowCome for the classic design, stay for the warm sound. This portable radio brings back the rounded design and tactile volume knob of 1950s radios, and adds a dash of warm, surprisingly powerful sound from its 2.5” full-range driver. It’s the perfect blend of legacy and innovation.FM digital tuner with up to 20 presetsMusic, news, drama or sports? Whatever you love to listen to, this FM radio gives you crystal-clear reception thanks to its telescopic aerial. Digital tuning makes stations super-easy to find—plus you can store 20 presets and allocate your two favourites to the quick-access buttons marked “1” and “2” on the front of the radio.Bluetooth 5.4 for a stable, longer-range connectionThis classic-looking radio does more than just radio. Bluetooth 5.4 connectivity lets you stream podcasts, playlists and more from your smart device to the radio. You’ll enjoy a stable connection with high-quality sound, even if your playlist is streaming from the phone you left in another room.Easily replaceable built-in rechargeable batteryWith a built-in rechargeable lithium-ion battery that’s easily replaceable when it reaches the end of its life, you can depend on The Janet radio for years to come! You get approx. 15 hours of play time from a full charge, and it takes around 3.5 hours via USB-C to fully recharge the battery.Modern colourful display with adjustable brightnessThe clear TFT display gives you station icons in full colour, plus text information from the station you’re listening to. A digital clock shows the time, and you can adjust the brightness to suit your room or dim the display at night.Dual alarms and Sleep TimerIf you like falling asleep to the sound of the radio, you can use the Sleep Timer to control how long the radio plays for—and set two alarms to ensure that you wake up. Alarms can use an alarm tone or the radio, and the volume starts low before gradually increasing.GRS-certified recycled plastic. Responsible packagingWe’re continually working to make our supply chain more sustainable and transparent. This clock radio is made with post-consumer recycled plastics, and our packaging uses FSC-certified recycled cardboard and soy-based ink.3.5 mm audio-out for wired headphonesWant to enjoy your favourite radio show while your partner watches TV? A 3.5 mm audio-out jack means you can plug your wired headphones into the radio and keep your sounds to yourself.

description.name: Philips TAV3000B/10 Century Bluetooth Turntable Record Player - Black
description.description: Retro design, modern sound3-speed turntableBluetooth® 5.4Bass-reflex speakersDigital sound controlTreble and bass controlCustom equaliser (on app)Max output power: 6 W (phono), 12 W (BT, audio in)Speaker impedance: 6 ohm Frequency response: 60Hz - 20kHzDimensions (W x H x D): 420 x 179 x 348 mmWeight: 4.35 kgPhilips The Stevie Century Bluetooth Turntable Vinyl Player - Black Vinyl singles and LPs. Gramophone records. Playlists. Vibe to it all with the retro Bluetooth® turntable that spins as good as it streams. You don't even need separate speakers to party—this deck has built-in stereo speakers.Looks from back then, sound from nowIt might look like your uncle's deck, but this turntable comes right up to date with its rich, warm sound and modern functionality. The all-in-one design fits perfectly on desks and sideboards—plus you get Bluetooth® convenience and our handy companion app to go with your vinyl.3-speed belt-driven turntable. Plays all your recordsFrom crate-digging finds to your most prized limited editions, you can spin 33 1/3 and 45 records—or even listen to 78 rpm gramophone records from way back in the day. Simply slide the selector to select the speed you want, then sit back and get lost in the music.Streams tunes too. Two-way Bluetooth® and Auracast™Two-way Bluetooth® connectivity lets you stream playlists to the turntable's built-in speakers—or play your records through your wireless speakers or headphones. You can also broadcast music out from this record player to as many Auracast™-compatible speakers as you want.Sound modeBrightWarmBalancedPowerfulClearAudio & DriversFull-range driver diameter: 2.5"Number of full-range drivers: 2Driver configuration: 1-waySound channels: 2.0Connectivity & StreamingBluetooth version: 5.4Supported Bluetooth profiles: A2DP, AVRCPSupported streaming formats: SBC, LC3Bluetooth range: 10 m (30 ft), line of sig{

description.name: Xiaomi Watch 2 Black Case With Black TPU Strap
description.description: Xiaomi Watch 2 smartwatch with 1.43" AMOLED display, 160+ sport modes and grey aluminium alloy bodyAMOLED display - 1.43" round design - 466 x 466 resolution (326 ppi) - 4nm Qualcomm Snapdragon W5+Gen 1 chipset - 2GB LPDDR4X RAM - 32GB internal memory - 12 channel PPG sensor - 160+ sport modes - GNSS L1+L5 - Bluetooth 5.2 - Mi Fitness app - Google Wear Os - Battery life up to 65 hours (typical use) - Interchangeable silicone strap - 5 ATM water resistant - Titanium GreyThe Watch 2 is a Xiaomi smartwatch with a 1.43-inch round AMOLED display, mounted on a 5 ATM water resistant design with a grey aluminium body and silver fluoroelastomer strap, both of which are interchangeable. The Qualcomm Snapdragon W5+Gen 1 chipset, 2GB LPDDR4X RAM and Google Wear Os operating system deliver smooth performance loaded with smart features. In fact, it can connect to your phone via Bluetooth to make and answer calls, and features Google Wallet, Maps and Google Assistant, as well as 32GB of internal memory for downloading apps and storing music. On top of this, the Xiaomi Watch 2 stands as an advanced fitness tracking device thanks to built-in GPS, more than 160 training modes and an accurate 12-channel heart rate module. All this with a 495 mAh battery capable of delivering up to 65 hours of typical use.Google Wallet, Google Maps and Google AssistantFirstly, the Xiaomi Watch 2 appears hand-in-hand with the Google Wear Os operating system. This means you'll be able to enjoy Google' s built-in apps as well as a wide range of third-party apps with optimised, ultra-smooth performance.In fact, it supports more than 200 popular third-party apps, which you can access through the Google Play shop; and includes:Google Wallet, so you can make contactless payments with your Xiaomi watch;Google Maps, with voice navigation directions directly from your smartwatch;and Google Assistant, which helps you complete tasks, send messages, control your smart devices and more with voice commands.Qualcomm Snapdragon W5+Gen 1 chipset and 2GB LPDDR4X RAMAnd with 32GB eMMC memory, you can download as many watch faces and third-party apps as you want, and even store over 1000 songs for local music playback - plug in wireless headphones to boost your listening experience!In addition, the flagship 4nm Qualcomm Snapdragon W5+Gen 1 processor and 2GB LPDDR4X RAM deliver high performance and low power consumption, with battery life of up to 65 hours of typical use.*Battery and charging related data were obtained from Xiaomi internal labs. Actual results may vary based on differences in software version, environment and usage conditions, and may not reflect actual product.With 5ATM water resistance and accurate GPS navigationOf course, the Xiaomi Watch 2 smartwatch also tracks sports in over 160 different activities, including a professional ski mode.In addition, this Xiaomi smartwatch is equipped with a dual-band GNSS L1+L5 chip that is compatible with the five major satellite positioning systems. This means that the Xiaomi Watch 2 offers excellent location accuracy, no matter whether you are in a rural environment or in the centre of a big city.And if that's not enough, the Xiaomi 2's 5 ATM water-resistant* design means you can wear it while doing your favourite water activities.*The 50m water resistance is based on ISO 22810:2010. The watch has a water resistance of 5 ATM (50m depth). It can be worn in the pool, when swimming near the shore or during other shallow water activities. However, it cannot be used in hot showers, saunas or when diving. Also, remember to avoid direct impact from fast currents during water sports. The water resistance function is not permanent and may diminish over time.Call for help in case of emergency or accidental dropAt the same time, the Xiaomi Watch 2 takes care of you and monitors your physical well-being around the clock with its 12-channel advanced heart rate detection module. It provides dynamic monitoring of heart rate, blood oxygen satur

description.description: OverviewThe 14” Corporate Traveller Briefcase is designed forthe travelling business professional. Features a convenient trolley strap foreffortless attachment to your rolling luggage. Made with durable material and astate-of-the-art SafePort® x D3O protection system to help prevent drop andside-impact damage, you can rest assured your devices are protected.The case features a dedicated file section, zip-downworkstation with business card holder, pen loops, key clip and multipleaccessory compartments to keep items organised. description.name: Astronaut Starry Sky LED Projector White
description.description: A star projector in the form of an astronaut is an interesting alternative to a night lamp in a children's room. It turns the room into a beautiful moving constellation wandering across the ceiling and walls. It will also work well during home parties. It has many operating modes and a remote control.Astronauts create a relaxing atmosphere, perfect for children who are afraid of the dark , especially before going to bed. It stimulates the child's imagination and allows him to relax. Children can feel as if they were traveling in space!8 backlight modes provide extraordinary experiences. Simulates the real starry sky, twinkling stars, bringing you a different dreamy feeling.The astronaut's head can be rotated 360° to any angle to switch, move and use between different angles. The moon base is removable and the arm can move 360 degrees, allowing for a variety of positions.The remote control allows you to control the device , thanks to which you can change the lighting mode, adjust the brightness and volume, and allows you to set the sleep timer.Specification:Modes of operation:- adjustable LED light brightness (40%, 70%, 100%),- adjustable speed (no movement, slow, medium, fast)- 360° rotation- built-in stopwatch (45 minutes, 90 minutes or all time)- green stars - they are fired by a laser and you can choose to make the stars brighten and disappear, stay lit permanently or turn them off- only stars – the option of leaving only stars in the room will work.Light type: RGB LEDLaser wavelength: 532 nmMaterial: ABS + PC + PVCColor: whiteDimensions: 12.3 x 11.5 x 24.5 cmVoltage: 5V/1APower supply: USB cable (included) 100-240V ~ 50/60Hz 0.4AControl: remote control (batteries: 2x AA - not included)Remote control distance: <5 mIncluded:- Astronaut projector- Stand- USB cable- Remote- User manual- packaging

description.name: JBL Reflect Aero TWS Noise Cancelling Earbuds | Mint
description.description: Designed for Movement Defined by YouDesigned with POWERFINS for a secure fit and better-fitting Oval TubesTM for all-day comfort, JBL Reflect Aero earbuds are the perfect companions for your active lifestyle. Stay focused on your goals with True Adaptive Noise Cancelling, while Smart Ambient technology keeps you alert to your surroundings. Whether you're out for a light walk or into a serious workout, the fast-charging 24-hour battery capacity means you'll never miss a beat of your personal soundtrack, powered by rich JBL Signature Sound. And when it's time to talk, 3 mics on each IP68 dustproof and waterproof earbud help to ensure perfect calls, wherever your journey leads.True Adaptive Noise Cancelling (4-Mic) with Smart AmbientHear more of what you want and less of what you don't. True Adaptive Noise Cancelling (4-mic) technology with Smart Ambient automatically adjusts to eliminate audio distractions while keeping you alert to your surroundings, wherever you go.6 Mics for Zero Noise for Perfect Calls with Voice AwareYou deserve to be heard. That's why 3 beamforming mics on each earbud ensure that your voice always comes through loud and clear, even on a breezy day. And you can hear it for yourself, since VoiceAware lets you control how much you hear your own voice during calls.Extreme Dustproof and WaterproofThe IP68 dustproof and waterproof JBL Reflect Aero earbuds are the perfect companions wherever you go, regardless of weather conditions. Dust-tight for hikes and beach parties, they're also built to function for 30 minutes at depths of up to 1,5 meter/5 feet—including salt water, as long as you remember to rinse them off afterwards.Comfortable, Secure FitWhy are JBL Reflect Aero earbuds the perfect companions for all-day adventures? Because they're designed with comfortable Oval TubesTM and POWERFINS for a secure, tightly sealed fit whether you're at work or working out. Use the "Check My Best Fit" test on the My JBL Headphones App to find your own unique fit.JBL Signature SoundDynamic 6.8mm drivers power the soundtrack of your life with bold sound and rich bass whether you're deep in meditationor sweating it out at the gym.8+16 Hours of Fast-Charging Battery LifeNever miss a beat with 8 hours of power inthe earbuds and 16 in the case or 7+14 withAdaptive Noise Cancelling on. Need a quickboost? No worries--you can fast chargeanother 4 hours of battery life in just 15minutes.Customize Your Sound ControlsCustomize the all-access JBL Reflect Aerocontrols so you can manage your earbudshands-free. When you download the MyJBL Headphones App, you'll find a full rangeof customization options for each earbud.Tailor the EQ to match your audiopreferences, choose your preferred VoiceAssistant, choose whether to have VoicePrompts guide you, and more.

description.name: Hoco ESD05 Hi-Res Audio RGB Gaming Wired Headphones Black
description.description: Hoco ESD05 is a new gaming headset with a microphone from the well-known mobile electronics brand Hoco, with high-quality sound, stylish premium appearance with LED backlighting in different colors, at an affordable price. Hoco ESD05 gaming headphones with a microphone have a cool design, closed acoustic design and sound characteristics ideal for all types of games.Large dynamic radiators with a diameter of 40 mm reveal the full depth of each sound without distortion, provide surround sound Stereo Sound, powerful, deep bass Deep Bass and high detail across the entire frequency range for complete immersion in the game. In the new Hoco ESD05 gaming headphones you will feel the maximum realism of your favorite games, the fullness of their high-quality sound and music accompaniment. Hoco Gaming headset can also play high-resolution audio (Hi-Res Audio), which allows you to hear a completely different level of quality, the headphones will pleasantly please even demanding music lovers with their clear sound and rich bass.The headphones have a built-in swivel omnidirectional external microphone, with passive noise cancellation, high and low frequency filtering, which will create maximum quality and comfort of communication. Soft, breathable ear cushions do not put pressure on the ears, lightweight headphones sit comfortably on the head, ensuring comfort during prolonged wearing. The durable cable is 200 centimeters long and will provide you with a comfortable space and greater freedom of action when you are at the computer.Gaming headphones from the popular company Hoco are a combination of maximum comfort, quality and affordable price. The ESD05 model is in no way inferior to more popular brands in this area, but has received a very affordable price.Features:The headphones have a stylish design, by which you can immediately determine that these are gaming headphones. The headphones have a beautifully pulsating backlight of different colors, which can be easily turned off if desired.High convenience, flexible and lightweight design, large, soft and comfortable ear cushions, maximum comfort during use. Full-size headphones, with large, completely covering the ears, do not tire even with prolonged use. The soft headband is attached to retractable straps and perfectly takes the shape of the head. This is the most comfortable option to date.Excellent sound, punchy bass, lossless music. Powerful speakers with a 40 mm diaphragm for surround sound. Surround and bass sound enhances the atmosphere of the game world, and the stereo distribution of sounds allows you to determine their source with high accuracy. Support for the Hi-Res Audio format. Volume adjustment with a wheel on the headphone.An external rotating microphone with noise suppression will allow you to conveniently adjust it. With a sensitivity of -58±3 dB, it captures sound well, allowing the headphones to perform the function of a Digital Talking Hands-Free headset with high voice quality and no extraneous noiseClosed acoustic design. Cups and headband with adjustable length are made of ABS plastic and high-quality artificial leather. Soft, breathable and durable ear cushions, ideal for noise isolation.High-quality materials, thoughtful design, lightweight, durable and flexible construction, thanks to which the headphones perfectly adapt to the anatomical features of any user. Reliable comfortable fit, adaptive retractable headbandThe kit includes a 2-in-1 adapter cable for comfortable universal use of headphones with a smartphone, tablet, laptop and desktop computer. A long, durable and lightweight 2-meter wire will give greater freedom of movementCharacteristics:Manufacturer Hoco. description.name:
The Hoco DI13 is a compact, motion-detecting camera designed for simple and effective recording. It operates exclusively with a memory card, making it a straightforward option for users who don’t want to rely on apps or smartphones. and the camera will capture footage instantly. To review the Footage,You can Connect the Camera to a Laptop or Computer How to Use the Hoco DI13 Camera:

1)Charge the Camera

 • Fully charge the camera for 2 hours before use. • The camera can work wirelessly for 30 minutes or continuously when connected to a power source.


2. Insert a TF Memory Card

 • Insert a TF memory card into the camera. • Note: If you don’t have a memory card, you can purchase one from our website.


3) Power On the Camera

 • Press and hold the power button for 3 seconds until the blue light turns on.


4)Start Recording (Video Mode)

 • After the blue light turns on, press the power button again. • The blue light will flash three times, indicating that the camera has started recording. • The camera will automatically save footage in 5-minute intervals.To stop recording: • Press the power button again.



Switch to Photo Mode • Press the M button to switch to photo mode. • The red light will turn on, indicating that the camera is in photo mode.To take a photo: • Press the power button to capture an image.To exit photo mode: • Press the M button again.Features
	•	1080p HD Resolution: Delivers clear and detailed video quality.	•	Infrared Night Vision: Records effectively even in low-light or nighttime conditions.	•	Motion Detection: Automatically begins recording when movement is detected.	•	Charge While Recording: Ensures uninterrupted operation with continuous power.	•	TF Card Support: Exclusively uses memory cards for secure and portable storage.Specifications:

-Microphone: Integrated for audio recording

-Records While Charging-Video Resolution: 1920*1080p HD-Image Resolution: 1280*720 HD-Battery:120mAh-Battery Life:30 Minutes-Maximum Support: 32G TF-Card-Saved Videos Automatically:Every 5 Minutes-Maximum Footage Capacity: Around 5 Hours-Size: 2.3 x 2.3 x 2.4 cm

The Hoco DI13 is a perfect choice for those seeking a reliable, app-free camera solution with essential features for recording and security.
